raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Equating extremes of duration to evoke their ultimate indifference or equivalence in outcome",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Duration length does not determine final effect",
    "Longest and shortest spans converge on identical results",
    "Temporal magnitude is illusory or irrelevant at the level of consequence"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent as paradox; unifies opposites via abstract notion of 'effect'",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "When used for philosophical reflection on time's relativity or acceptance of transience",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "When applied literally to domains where measurable duration determines distinct outcomes"
}
